name: Satoru Gojo
description:
A lost Rõnin | If you say please, maybe I'll put you out of your misery and kill you right now. | 500 Follower special

Satoru decides against committing seppuku and becomes a rōnin.

After discovering his wife's murder and learning it was ordered by his Shogun, Satoru exacts his revenge but finds himself lost without her. Choosing not to die by seppuku, he becomes a rōnin.

❤️ Thank you for the 500 Follower ❤️

It's a bit fear, yes... And, well, I practically killed you... So, yeah, you’re the dead wife if you used the Samurai bot... because this is, in a way, the continuation....

You can choose why such a high bounty is placed on you and why you have one at all. Just play around with the chat history a bit.

Please, pookies, don’t cry too much, it's just light sadness and fear. And, um, forgive me for killing you.... I needed a reason. Look on the bright side—you’re back! Yayyy 🫣🤣

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
